title: Why most teams wasted 2025 on Cypress
meta_description: Cut frontend test time 60% with Playwright 1.45 and Vitest 1.6 — the real stack most teams use in 2026 after dropping Cypress 13.x.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burned $2k+ on Cypress 13.x trying to make it work with Next.js 14.

Playwright 1.45 + Vitest 1.6 runs the same tests 3x faster.

Here is the setup we use now 👇
